setup: exp4c: 10k INFANTRY attacker vs 10k LANCER defender, Lv 6.0. Attacker brings Gordon. Gordon S1/S3 have no practical effect on this pure Infantry-vs-Lancer matchup; Gordon S2 level 2 reduces enemy Damage Dealt by 12% for 1 turn every 3 turns.
combat_stats: Attacker deploys INFANTRY (Atk199.2/Def192.0/Leth119.7/HP119.3) vs Defender LANCER (Atk194.1/Def165.7/Leth115.3/HP112.6). Gordon's high Lancer stats are visible on the panel but irrelevant because no attacker Lancers are deployed.

skill_2.description: Enemy Damage Dealt -12% for 1 turn every 3 turns.

skill_3.description: Observed trigger counter only; no practical effect in this pure Infantry-vs-Lancer matchup.

clock.notes: If S2 triggers on turns 3,6,... then 31 triggers require final turn >=93 and <96. If S3 triggers every 4 turns then 23 triggers require final turn >=92 and <96. Intersection: 93-95 turns.

_extraction: Captured from Martin screenshot 2026-07-09, attachment 2, exp4c.
